refined_caption: The trash bins outside the hospital are overflowing with waste. The surrounding area appears to be well-maintained with trees in the background.
complaint_description: I was appalled to see the trash bins outside the hospital overflowing with garbage. This is not only an eyesore, but it also poses a health risk to patients and visitors. The hospital should ensure that the trash is disposed of regularly.
voice_text: The trash cans outside the hospital are totally overflowing, it's really gross and unhealthy.
